name: Shige's Saimin Stand
tagline: Townies willingly make the 30-minute drive to Wahiawa because nobody else makes saimin noodles in-house like Shige's does.
talkStory: Open since 1990, Shige's is one of the last places on Oahu making saimin noodles from scratch in-house — the handmade noodle texture is noticeably different from anywhere else. Tue–Sat 10am–9pm.
